title: lazy-sunday smoky kenyan beef flank steak braai
description: a smoky and flavorful kenyan-inspired dish featuring braaied beef flank steak served with a side of spicy mango chutney.

ingredients.name: beef flank steak
ingredients.notes: allow for 20 minutes resting time after braaing.

instructions: preheat the braai to medium-high heat (around 220°c).
season the beef flank steak with salt, black pepper, coriander seeds, cumin seeds, and cardamom pods, making sure to massage the spices into the meat.
heat the coconut oil in a small pan over medium heat and sauté the minced garlic and grated ginger until fragrant.
add the chili flakes to the pan and sauté for a further minute, stirring constantly.
brush the beef flank steak with the spiced oil mixture on both sides.
braai the beef flank steak for 4-5 minutes per side, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
remove the beef from the braai and let it rest for 20 minutes before slicing thinly against the grain.
serve the sliced beef with a side of spicy mango chutney.
